title: Udhayanidhi Stalin’s ₹7.36 crore Red Giant investment missing in 2026 election affidavit: IT Department to Madras HC
description: The Income Tax Department has told the Madras High Court that an investment of ₹7.36 crore in Red Giant Movies disclosed by Udhayanidhi Stalin in 2021 is missing from his 2026 election affidavit.At the same time, the 2026 affidavit shows an investment of ₹2.63 crore in the same company in the name of his spouse, which was not disclosed earlier, the Department said. In a counter-affidavit, the Department pointed to inconsistencies across election affidavits and financial records. It said that no
